name: @starling/agent-wallet
description: Create and store an agent's trading keys securely for the Starling MCP server. Generate per-chain keys, de-risk them per venue, and seal them in an encrypted local keystore. Keys never leave your box.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/keystore/crypto.test.js dist/keystore/vectors.test.js
scripts.doctor: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-wallet.js doctor
